markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new CashflowDesk website and align on the go-forward strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Website Approved:** The new CashflowDesk site is approved for launch, pending minor design tweaks (e.g., fixing widow words in the header).](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [**Independent Brand:** The site must be fully independent of RAMP. All direct RAMP branding will be removed from the site, including the "backed by RAMP" mention and links to RAMP tools.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Content production will accelerate to 5 articles/week. The initial focus is on high-intent, low-difficulty keywords to build early traffic and demonstrate user value to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** GrowthX will implement its proprietary AI visibility tool to track performance, replacing Scrunch. Setup is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Topics

### Website Review & Feedback

  - [GrowthX presented the new CashflowDesk website, designed for trust-building and clear navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Key Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [New branding and structure with tiered content (Beginner, Intermediate, Operational Leader).](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Removed all CTAs (e.g., newsletter signup) to focus on content consumption.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [Replaced the top-right CTA with a search bar.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
      - [Integrated tools linking to RAMP properties.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Feedback & Decisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Brand Independence:** The site must be fully independent of RAMP to establish its own authority.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
          - [**Action:** Remove the "backed by RAMP" mention from the About page.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
          - [**Action:** Replace links to RAMP tools with links to third-party alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
      - [**Design Tweak:** Fix widow words in the dynamic header text to improve visual appeal on various screen sizes.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Content Strategy & Backlinks

  - [**Production Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [13 articles are currently in production.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [The target is 5 new articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [**Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [The Airtable content calendar will be updated with a "Priority" column to clarify the rationale behind topic selection.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Initial Strategy:** Target high-intent, low-difficulty keywords with sufficient search volume to generate early traffic and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**Goal:** Accelerate site authority and indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**From RAMP:** A few strategic backlinks from RAMP.com are approved for initial traction. GrowthX will propose specific articles and passages.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**From YouTube:** Victoria will add links from the CashflowDesk YouTube channel to relevant articles.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [GrowthX will use its proprietary AI visibility tool to track performance, replacing Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Tool Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [Tracks prompts by topic and funnel stage (e.g., awareness, evaluation).](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Organizes data to identify effective content and user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**RAMP Request:** Track bot activity at the log level to gauge how search engines discover and value the site. GrowthX will investigate feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
      - [Implement brand independence changes (remove RAMP mentions, replace tool links).](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
      - [Fix widow words in the header text.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [Send new logo and creative assets to Victoria.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [Propose a list of alternative tools for Victoria's review.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Propose a backlink strategy from RAMP.com.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Set up the AI visibility tool and send a Loom walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [Update the Airtable content calendar with a "Priority" column.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Victoria:**](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Add links from the CashflowDesk YouTube channel to relevant articles.](https://fathom.video/share/vi4yMesUxi5ysds6cXvEiXUxktEUift2?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
